text: For 71 years you've filled our lives with love,
With laughter, kindness, and blessings from above.
A little goofy, always full of cheer,
We are so lucky to have you here.
Your kitchen is where the magic begins,
With beef stew that always brings everyone in.
Homemade popsicles, smoothies too,
Everything tastes better because it's made by you.
Ellie loves making smoothies by your side,
With giggles and memories we never want to hide.
And Nora eats every bite of gnoc biang with delight,
Or cruises around your house in her toy car day and night.
You care for Suki and Tater with so much devotion,
Giving your cats endless love and affection.
Your generous heart shines in all that you do,
A home full of warmth because of you.
From Maui sunsets in 2019,
To Lady Gaga lighting up the scene,
And Peanuts with the Symphony this year,
Our favorite moments are the ones we share.
We danced through songs and laughed along the way,
Making memories we will treasure every day.
The best adventures are always the ones with you,
Because every moment feels brand new.
We love you!
Happy Birthday!
